name: Java Spring Boot

toolchain.lint: ./mvnw spotless:check || ./gradlew spotlessCheck || echo 'No Spotless plugin — skip lint'
toolchain.format: ./mvnw spotless:apply || ./gradlew spotlessApply || echo 'No Spotless plugin — skip format'

install_tools: command -v java || echo "ERROR: JDK not found"; test -f ./mvnw -o -f ./gradlew || echo "ERROR: No build wrapper found"
